creator: hostmaster@GTS.NET
text:
Created attachment 157162
vboxmanage guestproperty enumerate

freebsd host: 9.3-STABLE r283219 amd64

freebsd guest: 10.1-STABLE r283530 amd64

virtualbox 4.3.28 on both host & guest

the guest clock runs approx. 6 times slower than normal
guest additions installed & running - 4.3.28

another freebsd guest runs fine: 9.1-PRERELEASE amd64
as does solaris 10 1/13

It was working fine when host was 9.1-stable with vbox 4.1
and guest was 10.1 prerelease
